leadText: Zap Cannon (Japanese: でんじほう Electromagnetic Cannon) is a damage-dealing Electric-type move introduced in Generation II. It was TM07 in Generation II.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation II 1.2 Generation III 1.3 Generation IV onwards 1.4 Generation IX 1.4.1 Pokémon Legends: Z-A Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation II [ edit | edit source ] Zap Cannon has a base power of 100 and has a 255/256 (~99.6%) chance of paralyzing the target. Generation III [ edit | edit source ] Zap Cannon now paralyzes the target every time it hits. Zap Cannon can be used as the second move of a Pokémon Contest combination , with the user gaining 4 bonus appeal points if Lock-On was used in the previous turn. Generation IV onwards [ edit | edit source ] Zap Cannon's power was raised to 120. Pokémon with the Bulletproof Ability are immune to Zap Cannon. Zap Cannon can also be used as part of a Contest Spectacular combination , causing Hex and Smelling Salts to give extra three appeal points if used in the next turn. Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Z-A [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Z-A Category Special Accuracy 100% Standard Plus Move Power 120 144 Cooldown 15s Move wind-up time 50 frames Effect duration —s Additional effect — — — None

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Stad2 An Electric -type attack. Inaccurate but is guaranteed to cause paralysis if it hits. G S C An attack that always paralyzes. R S E Colo XD Powerful and sure to cause paralysis, but inaccurate. FR LG An electric blast is fired like a cannon to inflict damage and paralyze. D P Pt HG SS PBR B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA The user fires an electric blast like a cannon to inflict damage and cause paralysis. S V The user attacks by firing an electric blast like a cannon. This also leaves the target with paralysis. ZA The user attacks by firing an electric blast like a cannon. This also leaves targets paralyzed without fail.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B Inflicts damage on the target, even at a distance. It also causes paralysis, preventing any attacks or moves. MD T D S Inflicts damage on the target, even at a distance. It also inflicts a Paralysis status. A Pokémon with the Paralysis status has slowed movement and is incapable of action. B S L はなれたポケモンに ダメージをあたえる しかも まひじょうたいにかえる まひじょうたいの ポケモンは わざが だせない MD GtI It damages even a faraway Pokémon. It also causes the Paralysis status condition. With the Paralysis status, the Pokémon's Travel Speed goes down and it can't attack or use moves. S MD It damages a Pokémon, even one far away. It also causes paralysis.
